behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names both files, mentions IsHeader/IsFooter guard, ArgumentOutOfRangeException, Code Review Instructions section, dotnet format, #nullable enable line 1, RS0017, and the specific bash patterns (git diff --name-only --diff-filter=U, head -1, LC_ALL=C sort).

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what is broken and what to include but does not specify exact code or line numbers.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests accept two patterns (early return or inverted guard wrapping PositionIsSelected) and match string patterns rather than gold-specific variable names.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests run dotnet build, dotnet format, and execute subprocess scripts to structurally verify the guard.

test_not_tautological.reason: The f2p test requires both IsHeader and IsFooter checks plus PositionIsSelected remaining, which a stub cannot satisfy.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover adapter guard, copilot-instructions Code Review section, dotnet format reference, and build validation.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comments (Gates, Fail-to-pass) and descriptive names.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task does not produce structured data.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names files (required for task clarity) but not specific lines; domain-appropriate localization.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: copilot-instructions.md edit is an appended section, localized and not a full rewrite.
